lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The car is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are fully functional and operate as intended.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. The engine starts consistently and the transmission shifts as expected, though there is a minor oil seep typical for its age and mileage. The exterior shows its history with some noticeable paint fading on the hood and a few small door dings. Inside, the upholstery shows some wear and tear, but all electronics and the climate control remain fully functional. It is a solid, honest car for someone needing dependable transportation.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing a rare find for the discerning buyer. It has been meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage and shows absolutely no signs of wear. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, showroom-quality luster, and the interior remains in pristine, factory-fresh condition with no blemishes or odors. Mechanically, the car performs perfectly, with all maintenance records up to date and performed exclusively by authorized dealerships. Every feature, from the advanced electronics to the smallest trim piece, is in like-new working order. This is an exceptional example of the model, offering a driving experience that feels as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom-ready condition, every facet of this motorcar—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, untouched interior—reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically uncompromising, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a premier acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty! I’ve treated this car like my own baby, and honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled right off the showroom floor. It’s in truly pristine, flawless condition—not a single scratch or dent anywhere. It drives like a total dream and is ready for a new home. You won't find another one this clean, so come grab it before it's gone!
This specimen represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance, featuring a meticulously maintained 3.8L flat-six powerplant with integrated dry-sump lubrication for optimal oil pressure
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service records available.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish free of any chips or swirls. The interior is equally pristine, featuring factory-fresh leather and a cabin that still retains its original scent. This vehicle has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy, including a full service history from certified specialists and exclusively original components. With exceptionally low mileage and zero mechanical flaws, it drives with the precision and smoothness of a new car. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly flawless example of engineering excellence, ideal for a serious collector or enthusiast.

Presenting a superlative specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original luster and integrity. Every aspect of this motorcar reflects a legacy of meticulous stewardship and rigorous upkeep. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that transcends the typical secondary market offering, this example represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly pristine condition, exhibiting flawless exterior surfaces and an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Rigorously inspected and verified for mechanical perfection, this automobile offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the absolute pinnacle of quality.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it—no scratches, no weird smells, just pure driving bliss. It’s been my absolute baby, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. You won't find another one this clean! Come take a look, I promise you're going to fall in love with it.

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3, representing a pinnacle of atmospheric engineering. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-gated Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis is structurally flawless, featuring documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul to ensure optimal variable valve timing. Performance is managed by a variable M differential lock and a perfectly balanced 50/50 weight distribution. Maintained to a concours standard, the suspension geometry remains true with fresh OEM bushings, and the braking system retains its factory-spec bite. This is a mechanically synchronized, high-revving masterpiece in true showroom condition, free of any thermal cycling fatigue or aesthetic degradation.
Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Immaculate paint and interior. Full service history. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, maintained to a standard that rivals its first day on the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in breathtaking condition; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, and the dashboard is completely free of sun damage or scratches. Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. An uncompromising choice for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in impeccable condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point certification by our master technicians, it offers the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a showroom-quality automobile. Performance is seamless, and the aesthetic presentation is flawless, ensuring this investment meets the most exacting requirements.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in truly incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve pampered this beauty since day one, keeping it garage-kept and spotless. There isn't a scratch or a dent to be found, and it drives like a cloud. I'm so sad to see it go, but I'm looking for a great new home for it. You definitely won't find another one this clean!

Offering a mechanically peerless E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, exhibiting a linear power band and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. The dual-VANOS system has been meticulously serviced, and the rear subframe has been reinforced to ensure structural integrity under high lateral G-loads. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission to a limited-slip differential, providing exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis remains taut with OEM-spec bushings and refreshed dampers, maintaining the factory-intended 50/50 weight distribution. Every component, from the individual throttle bodies to the cross-drilled rotors, functions with surgical precision. This is a turnkey investment for the purist seeking a raw, analog driving experience without compromise.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Interior like new. Fully maintained. No issues.

Experience automotive perfection with this truly pristine, garage-kept masterpiece. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, featuring premium upholstery that still carries that new-car scent, entirely free of wear or odors. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; it has been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. Every button, sensor, and mechanical component functions flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a turn-key vehicle that needs absolutely nothing. Truly a 'no-excuses' car for the buyer who demands the absolute best.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior, has been meticulously maintained to meet the highest standards of excellence. This benchmark example offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no visible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset.

Hey there! I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in total mint condition! It’s been babied since day one—always garaged, meticulously detailed, and it still has that brand-new feel. You won’t find a single flaw on this beauty; it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s ready for a new home and I know you’re going to love it as much as I have! Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Mint condition. Single owner. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Full maintenance records included.

Experience automotive perfection with this collector-grade vehicle, meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish without a single stone chip or swirl mark, while the interior remains in showroom condition, still retaining its original scent and showing zero wear on the premium upholstery. Every electronic component and mechanical system operates with precision, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history and exceptionally low mileage. The undercarriage is as clean as the body, reflecting the obsessive care this car has received. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine, investment-quality example that looks and drives exactly as it did on the showroom floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in a showroom state that demands the attention of the most discerning collector. Every surface reflects meticulous stewardship, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled pedigree and aesthetic integrity.
